name: zoom-team-chat-search
description: Read-only Zoom Team Chat search, AI-Companion grounded Q&A, and meeting transcripts. Zero-config: no client secret, no setup.
long_description: Provides 22 read-only tools for Zoom Team Chat (channels, messages, threads, attachments, shared spaces, mention groups, pinned messages, bookmarks) and meeting transcripts. Includes AI-Companion-powered search and grounded Q&A across Zoom Meetings, Chat, and Docs. Pre-configured for the PortSwigger Zoom app — Swiggers double-click to install and authorise once with no credentials to enter.
